important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 15 days from the date of publication of advertisement in Employment News ie 03-07-2026

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: HSSC with minimum 60% marks and passed intermediate Chartered Accountancy / Cost & Management Accountancy exam. Minimum one year relevant experience (post qualification) as on 01/06/2026.
qualification.details: HSSC with minimum 60% marks. Passed Intermediate Chartered Accountancy / Cost & Management Accountancy exam. Minimum one year relevant experience (post qualification) as on 01/06/2026.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 45,000/- (Fixed) per month for first two Years & Rs. 55,000/- (Fixed) per month for 3rd & 4th year.
salary_details.details: First two Years: Rs. 45,000/- (Fixed) per month. 3rd & 4th year: Rs. 55,000/- (Fixed) per month.

selection_process: Performance in personal interview Meeting of required Educational Qualification and Experience criteria
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Yantra India Assistant Executive (Finance & Accounts) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Submit application form (in Hard Copy) through speed post/courier service to the Director (HR), YANTRA INDIA LIMITED, Corporate HQ, Yantra India Limited, Ambajhari, Nagpur - 440021, Maharashtra.

Scanned copy of the application form along-with the enclosures can be sent by e-mail to [email protected], clearly mentioning in the subject heading 'APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF ASSISTANT EXECUTIVE (FINANCE & ACCOUNTS)'.
Hard copy of the Application is to be submitted along-with the self-attested recent passport size photograph.
Self-attested copies of documents/certificates in support of claim regarding age, qualification, experience etc. are also to be attached with application form.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Yantra India Assistant Executive (Finance & Accounts) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Yantra India Assistant Executive (Finance & Accounts) recruitment is 03-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed HSSC with a minimum of 60% marks and completed the Intermediate Chartered Accountancy or Cost & Management Accountancy exam.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Assistant Executive (Finance & Accounts) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 40 years as of 01.06.2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 45,000/- (Fixed) per month for the first two years, and Rs. 55,000/- (Fixed) per month for the 3rd and 4th year.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any work experience required?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of one year of relevant experience (post qualification) as of 01/06/2026 is required.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline via speed post/courier service to the specified address, and a scanned copy can also be emailed.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There is only 1 vacancy for the Assistant Executive (Finance & Accounts) post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a performance in a personal interview and meeting the required educational qualification and experience criteria.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type is contractual.
